categories.subtitle: Statement pieces - grand, dramatic, unforgettable
categories.name: Chandeliers
categories.longDesc: Make a grand statement with our breathtaking chandelier collection. From cascading crystal designs to modern geometric forms, each piece is a masterwork of light and craftsmanship, designed to be the centrepiece of any room.
categories.shortDesc: Grand centrepieces that redefine luxury — crystal, geometric & contemporary styles.

categories.subtitle: Hanging beauties - perfect focal points for every room
categories.name: Pendant Lights
categories.longDesc: Our pendant light collection blends minimalist elegance with artistic boldness. Perfect for kitchen islands, dining tables, and foyers — pendant lights create intimate, focused ambiance wherever they hang.
categories.shortDesc: Sculptural pendants that bring focused warmth and modern elegance to any space.

categories.subtitle: Wall accents - ambient layers that define mood
categories.name: Wall Sconces
categories.longDesc: Wall sconces from Lumina are the perfect accent lighting solution. They add depth, drama, and warmth to hallways, bedrooms, and living rooms. Choose from ornate traditional styles to sleek contemporary designs.
categories.shortDesc: Elegant wall fixtures that add depth and warmth to hallways and living spaces.

categories.subtitle: Desk and bedside companions - style meets function
categories.name: Table Lamps
categories.longDesc: Our designer table lamps are wearable art for your surfaces. Each lamp is crafted with meticulous attention to detail — the perfect fusion of form and function for bedrooms, studies, and living rooms.
categories.shortDesc: Artistic table lamps that add character and warm glow to any surface or corner.

categories.subtitle: Standing statements - light that fills the whole room
categories.name: Floor Lamps
categories.longDesc: Floor lamps from Lumina are sculptural statements that stand tall and proud. Whether arching gracefully over a reading chair or standing as a vertical art piece, our floor lamps bring drama and elegance to any room.
categories.shortDesc: Tall sculptural floor lamps that define corners and illuminate entire rooms beautifully.

categories.subtitle: Overhead heroes - clean light that defines the whole space
categories.name: Ceiling Lights
categories.longDesc: Our ceiling lights and flush mounts are the foundation of any room's lighting plan. Available in modern minimalist styles, ornate classic designs, and everything in between — perfect for every ceiling and every taste.
categories.shortDesc: Flush mounts and semi-flush fixtures for a clean, modern overhead lighting solution.

categories.subtitle: Exterior pieces - safe, beautiful, weather-resistant
categories.name: Outdoor & Garden Lights
categories.longDesc: Extend your interior elegance to the outdoors with Lumina's garden and outdoor lighting collection. Weather-resistant, beautifully crafted lanterns, pathway lights, and wall lights that make your exteriors as stunning as your interiors.

categories.subtitle: Bold pieces - raw materials, clean lines, commercial character
categories.name: Industrial & Architectural Lights
categories.longDesc: Bold, purposeful lighting rooted in raw materials and clean lines. Our industrial and architectural collection features exposed Edison cage pendants, track lighting systems, pipe-style wall brackets, and linear LED profiles — built for lofts, studios, commercial spaces, and homes that embrace an edgy, design-forward aesthetic.
categories.shortDesc: Bold pieces - raw materials, clean lines, commercial character

products.name: Crystal Grand Chandelier
products.desc: A breathtaking cascade of hand-cut crystals suspended from an ornate brass frame. Commands attention in ballrooms, grand foyers, and luxury dining rooms. Each crystal is precision-cut to refract light into thousands of shimmering reflections.

products.name: Geometric Modern Chandelier
products.desc: Bold geometric architecture meets warm Edison filament glow. The angular black steel frame creates striking visual shadows. Perfect for loft spaces, modern dining rooms, and open-plan living areas.

products.name: Sputnik Starburst Chandelier
products.desc: Inspired by the space age, this starburst chandelier radiates elegance from every angle. Multiple brass arms extend outward, each tipped with a globe bulb that casts a warm omnidirectional glow.

products.name: Art Deco Glamour Chandelier
products.desc: Channel the golden age of Hollywood with this opulent Art Deco chandelier. Tiered geometric panels of frosted glass and polished gold frame create a dramatic statement piece.

products.name: Raindrop Cascade Chandelier
products.desc: Hundreds of individually suspended glass teardrop pendants create a mesmerising waterfall of light. Each drop catches and scatters light uniquely, filling the room with shimmering, dancing reflections.

products.name: Antique Candle Chandelier
products.desc: Evoke old-world European grandeur with this hand-forged wrought iron chandelier. Candle-style bulb holders fan outward from a central column, casting a warm, intimate amber glow.

products.name: Nordic Cluster Pendant
products.desc: A constellation of glass globes suspended at varying heights from a brushed brass canopy. Creates a warm, intimate atmosphere ideal for dining areas, kitchen islands, and boutique cafes.

products.name: Industrial Cone Pendant
products.desc: A crisp matte-black conical shade directs warm Edison filament light downward in a focused, dramatic pool. Ideal over kitchen countertops, billiard tables, and restaurant bars.

products.name: Art Glass Orb Pendant
products.desc: Individually hand-blown in borosilicate glass, each orb carries subtle swirls of amber and gold unique to that piece. A statement of artisanal craftsmanship.

products.name: Rattan Weave Pendant
products.desc: Hand-woven rattan in a warm honey tone filters light into intricate dappled patterns. Brings texture, warmth, and organic charm indoors.

products.name: Crystal Drop Pendant
products.desc: A single dramatic cascade of K9 crystal drops flowing from a polished gold frame - luxury pendant on a smaller scale.

products.name: Geometric Cage Pendant
products.desc: An open geometric wire cage in a warm antique brass finish creates a sophisticated industrial-luxe look and beautiful shadow patterns.

products.name: Art Deco Fan Sconce
products.desc: An iconic fan-shaped shade in frosted white glass with a polished gold Art Deco frame. Evokes the opulence of 1920s Parisian hotels. Perfect for flanking mirrors, beds, or corridor walls.

products.name: Crystal Wing Sconce
products.desc: Crystal-encrusted wings radiate light upward and outward in a dramatic halo effect. Each crystal facet scatters prismatic light across the walls.

products.name: Industrial Pipe Sconce
products.desc: Exposed pipe work in matte black steel with a vintage Edison bulb creates a raw industrial-loft aesthetic. Adjustable pivoting arm lets you direct light exactly where needed.

products.name: Brushed Brass Modern Sconce
products.desc: A sleek curved arm in brushed warm brass culminates in a small half-dome shade. Layers ambient light beautifully in bedrooms, reading nooks, and hotel-style corridors.

products.name: Marble & Gold Wall Light
products.desc: A solid marble backplate in natural white Carrara with gold-plated arms and sockets. Each piece is unique due to the natural marble veining.

products.name: Antique Lantern Sconce
products.desc: A miniature lantern in antiqued bronze with clear seeded glass panels. Brings a warm, historic charm to heritage homes, farmhouses, and verandas.

products.name: Tiffany Stained Glass Lamp
products.desc: Hand-assembled from individually cut and soldered stained glass pieces. When lit, it transforms into a living mosaic of coloured light - a true heirloom piece.

products.name: Ceramic Art Base Lamp
products.desc: A hand-thrown ceramic base in a matte sage-and-cream glaze, topped with a perfectly proportioned linen drum shade. Every base has a one-of-a-kind glaze pattern.

products.name: Crystal Column Table Lamp
products.desc: A stacked crystal-cut column base catches light from every angle. Topped with a slim white silk shade for a warm, diffused glow - the ultimate bedside luxury piece.

products.name: Hammered Copper Lamp
products.desc: A hand-hammered copper base in warm burnished tones pairs with a complementary fabric shade. The hammered texture catches light and improves character with age.

products.name: Marble & Gold Table Lamp
products.desc: A solid Italian marble base in white with natural grey veining, topped with a brushed gold neck and pleated cream shade. A timeless combination of the finest materials.

products.name: LED Touch Dimmer Lamp
products.desc: A contemporary touch-sensitive base lets you cycle through four levels of warm white brightness with a simple tap. Perfect for minimalist bedrooms and home offices.

products.name: Brass Arc Floor Lamp
products.desc: A sweeping polished brass arc rises to 190cm before curving gracefully over your sofa or reading chair. The large dome shade delivers a warm downlight perfect for reading.

products.name: Tripod Floor Lamp
products.desc: Three solid walnut legs splay outward from a brushed brass centre column in classic Mid-Century Modern geometry. Topped with a conical linen shade that casts warm, directional light.

products.name: Industrial Torchiere
products.desc: A sleek matte-black pole culminates in an upward-facing bowl that bounces light off the ceiling for a broad, ambient glow. Perfect for dark corners needing diffused light.

products.name: Crystal Column Floor Lamp
products.desc: A floor-to-ceiling column of stacked crystal discs creates a sculptural presence - equally a light source and a piece of fine art. Commands the room with quiet authority.

products.name: Adjustable Reading Lamp
products.desc: Test Test A fully articulated arm with multi-point joints allows precise positioning of the reading head. A beloved choice for home libraries, studies, and bedside reading areas.

products.name: Globe Cascade Floor Lamp
products.desc: Multiple brass arms branch from a central pole, each ending in a warm opal glass globe at varying heights. An artistic sculptural silhouette by day, a warm glow by night.

products.name: Crystal Flush Mount
products.desc: A low-profile flush mount ceiling light encrusted with K9 crystals that scatter brilliant prismatic light. Ideal for bedrooms, corridors, and spaces without ceiling height for a hanging fixture.

products.name: Modern LED Panel Light
products.desc: An ultra-slim aluminium panel delivers broad, even illumination with zero hot spots or glare. The frameless design disappears into the ceiling for a clean architectural look.

products.name: Drum Shade Ceiling Light
products.desc: A generous drum shade in pleated ivory linen softens and diffuses light beautifully across dining areas and bedrooms. The brushed brass ceiling rose adds a refined finish.

products.name: Starlight LED Ceiling
products.desc: Hundreds of fibre-optic LED pinpoints recreate a night-sky effect on your ceiling. Creates a magical, immersive atmosphere in bedrooms, home theatres, and luxury master suites.

products.name: Rose Gold Petal Ceiling
products.desc: Overlapping petal-shaped panels in brushed rose gold radiate outward from a central LED source like an opening bloom. A contemporary sculptural centrepiece for any modern living room.

products.name: Schoolhouse Flush Mount
products.desc: A classic globe-shaped clear glass shade on a polished antique brass ceiling plate - timeless in a heritage home or a modern Scandinavian-style flat.

products.name: Classic Garden Post Lamp
products.desc: A traditional lantern-top post light in powder-coated black steel. IP65-rated housing ensures full protection against rain and dust. A garden essential.

products.name: Outdoor Wall Lantern
products.desc: A classic rectangular wall lantern in antique bronze with clear seeded glass panels. Ideal for driveways, entrances, and porches. Elegantly traditional and built to last outdoors.

products.name: Festoon String Lights
products.desc: A generous 10-metre run of warm white festoon bulbs. Transforms gardens, terraces, and pergolas into magical entertaining spaces. Weatherproof and dimmable.

products.name: Solar Spike Garden Light
products.desc: A ground-spike solar LED light that can be aimed at plants, trees, or garden features. Charges by day and illuminates automatically at dusk - zero running costs.

products.name: Pathway Bollard Light
products.desc: A modern cylindrical bollard in brushed aluminium with a 360-degree frosted diffuser ring. Marks out pathways and driveways elegantly. Low-profile and highly visible.

products.name: Waterfall Outdoor Pendant
products.desc: A large natural rattan pendant for covered outdoor spaces - pergolas, verandas, and alfresco dining areas. Creates a resort-style tropical ambience.

products.name: Edison Cage Pendant
products.desc: A raw steel cage pendant with an oversized exposed Edison filament bulb at its centre. The open cage frame casts dramatic geometric shadow patterns across loft ceilings and brick walls. An icon of the industrial-chic movement.

products.name: Architectural Track System
products.desc: A modular black metal track system with individually adjustable spotlight heads. Each head rotates 350 degrees and tilts 90 degrees for precise directional control. Perfect for galleries, retail spaces, restaurants, and accent wall lighting.

products.name: Iron Pipe Wall Bracket
products.desc: Inspired by old factory plumbing, this hand-assembled iron pipe wall bracket holds a vintage Edison globe bulb on an adjustable pivot arm. Raw, characterful, and unmistakably industrial - a favourite in loft apartments and creative offices.

products.name: Linear LED Profile Strip
products.desc: A sleek aluminium extrusion profile housing a continuous LED strip delivers razor-sharp linear light for under-cabinet, cove, staircase, and perimeter lighting. Available in warm white, cool white, and RGB. The tool of choice for architectural lighting designers.

products.name: Warehouse Dome Pendant
products.desc: A wide, deep pressed-steel dome in a gunmetal grey finish hangs from an adjustable cable and canopy. Originally derived from early 20th-century factory and warehouse lighting, this pendant delivers powerful downward illumination with a broad, even spread.

products.name: Exposed Bulb Cluster Light
products.desc: Multiple Edison ST64 bulbs hang at varying lengths from a single ceiling rose on twisted fabric cables. Each bulb glows with warm amber filament light, creating a sculptural, artisanal cluster that is pure visual drama for high-ceiling dining rooms and hotel lobbies.
